title: Gunji SMP
description: The Modpack for the Gunji SMP!
body:
This is a Create Mod Modpack for the members of the Gunji SMP. It contains lots of fun Mods that enhance the Create mod and bring a great multiplayer experience! This pack is useful if you want to play along one of the creators and replicate their builds. This is also a generally fun pack for people who are interested in the Create Mod.

This pack includes many Create Mod addons that gives you an infinetly more amount of things you can do with it, from building giant facotries that automate every item in the game to exploring the world with new Create themed structures. This pack also adds two new dimensions, the Bumblezone and Deep Dark. These allow a whole new level of exploration and new armour types that enhance PvP. If exploration isnt your thing, stay put, civilize and expand your city. Enjoy!
